aiPlaybookPage.title: Internal AI playbook
aiPlaybookPage.subtitle: Confidential process guide for assistants (e.g. PO to wholesale order). Loaded from your Cloud Function after login.
aiPlaybookPage.notConfigured: Add VITE_AI_PLAYBOOK_URL to `.env.local` (or your CI/hosting env) with your deployed Cloud Function URL — see `management-frontend/functions/README.md` — then rebuild. Note: `npm run dev` loads the playbook from `docs/` automatically; this message only appears on production builds without the variable.
aiPlaybookPage.fetchFailedHint: Usually a network/CORS issue or the Cloud Function is missing. Redeploy Hosting + Functions. On Firebase Hosting, use the same-origin path /api/ai-playbook (see management-frontend/functions/README.md).
aiPlaybookPage.footer: Served only with a valid management token; not exposed as public hosting files.
aiPlaybookPage.devOnlyBundled: Development mode: content is read from the repo `docs/` folder. Production hosting must set VITE_AI_PLAYBOOK_URL (Cloud Function + JWT).
aiPlaybookPage.footerDev: Development copy from the repository. For production, deploy the function and set VITE_AI_PLAYBOOK_URL so staff get JWT-protected, deploy-time content.

productsPage.name: Name
productsPage.importDialogIntro: Upload an Excel file (.xlsx) with the following headers in the first row:
productsPage.importHeaderUnit: Unit ("weight" or leave blank for quantity)
productsPage.confirmDeactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate this product?
productsPage.categoryPlaceholder: Select existing or type new category
productsPage.uploadOrPaste: Upload an image file or paste from clipboard (Ctrl+V / Cmd+V)
productsPage.weightBarcodePrefixHint: Up to 8 digits. Receipt barcode = prefix + weight (0.01 kg) + check digit (0). E.g. 1.2 kg with prefix 12345678 → 1234567801200
productsPage.weightBarcodePrefixFallbackWarning: No prefix set. Receipt barcodes will use the last 8 digits of the product barcode ({{prefix}}). Set a dedicated prefix to avoid conflicts with other weight products.
productsPage.weightBarcodePrefixMissingWarning: No weight barcode prefix and no numeric product barcode. Weight receipt barcodes will not print until you set a prefix or a product barcode.
productsPage.priceWeightGHint: Retail price applies to this weight in grams. Leave empty for 1000 g (1 kg). Line total = (price ÷ this weight) × sold weight.
productsPage.qtyBarcodeHint: Scanned at POS and stocktake for unit sales
productsPage.weightBarcodeHint: Scanned at POS and stocktake for weight sales
productsPage.saleModeRequired: Select at least one: sell by qty or sell by weight
productsPage.qtyBarcodeRequired: Qty barcode is required when sell by qty is enabled
productsPage.weightBarcodeRequired: Weight barcode is required when sell by weight is enabled
productsPage.barcodesMustDiffer: Qty and weight barcodes must be different
productsPage.barcodeHint: Scanned at POS and stocktake for this variant. For weight products, receipt barcodes are generated from this barcode automatically.
productsPage.prepackWeightGHint: Grams per prepacked unit. Used to convert between prepacked and loose weight inventory.
productsPage.sellingWeightGHint: Grams per prepacked unit and grams the retail price applies to (e.g. 1000 = per kg). Default 1000 if empty.

productLines.title: Product lines
productLines.subtitle: Group sellable variants (box sizes, weight SKUs) under one catalog product.
productLines.empty: No product lines yet. Create one to group box sizes or weight SKUs.
productLines.searchPlaceholder: Product line name, Chinese name, SKU, barcode…
productLines.noLinesMatchFilter: No product lines match your search or category filter.
productLines.confirmDeactivate: Deactivate this product line? All variants must be deactivated first.
productLines.existingLineHint: Pick a line to add another variant (e.g. 6 pcs box). Leave empty to create a new line.
productLines.lineNameHint: Shared name for all variants (e.g. Abalone)
productLines.lineNameRequired: Product line name is required when not selecting an existing line
productLines.variantLabelHint: Distinguishes box sizes or weight SKU under the same line
productLines.unitsPerPackHint: Pieces in this box (e.g. 3 or 6). Optional.
productLines.weightVariantHint: Grams the retail price applies to (shown as per XXXg, e.g. 1000 = per 1000g).
productLines.selectSaleTypeFirst: Select how this variant is sold to continue.
productLines.weightVariantAlreadyExists: This product line already has a weight variant.

productLineDetail.title: Product line
productLineDetail.imageHint: Shared image for all variants. Paste an image or upload a file.
productLineDetail.invalidImageType: Invalid file type. Please upload a JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP image.
productLineDetail.variantsEditHint: Edit variant fields below, then click Save to apply all changes.
productLineDetail.confirmUnlockShipStore: Unlock to change the default wholesale ship store for variants on this line. Continue?
productLineDetail.shipStoreLockedHint: Default ship store is locked. Click Unlock ship store to edit.

productDetail.noCurrencyRates: No currency rates available. Please add currencies first.
productDetail.exchangeRateHelper: Automatically set based on selected currency
productDetail.directRetailPriceHelper: Used for e-catalog price calculation with sector discount
productDetail.wholesaleUnitsPerBoxHelper: Used to predict expected boxes in wholesale orders

categories.title: Categories
categories.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete category "{{name}}"? This will remove the category from all products.
categories.noCategories: No categories found. Categories are created when you assign them to products.
categories.normalizeSuccess: Normalized {{count}} product category name(s). Duplicate names merged.
categories.infoMessage: Categories are automatically created when you assign them to products. Deleting a category will remove it from all products.
categories.createInfo: The category will be created when you assign it to a product.
categories.renameWarning: This will rename the category in all products that use it.

sectors.title: Sectors
sectors.discountRateHelper: Base discount rate for this sector
sectors.confirmDeactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate this sector?

stock.title: Stock Management
stock.lowStockAlert: Low Stock Alert: {{count}} item(s) below threshold
stock.selectVariantRequired: Select a variant for this product line.
stock.selectVariantHint: Choose pack size or weight option.
stock.variantSelectPlaceholder: Choose variant name or scan barcode
stock.selectStoreForVariant: Select a store above. Scan a barcode (Enter) or use Search by… to find a product.
stock.noProductSelected: No product selected. Search by barcode or name.
stock.barcodeNotFound: No product found for this barcode.
stock.enterNameOrCategory: Enter a product name or category.
stock.searchProductsHint: Enter a product name or category, then search.
stock.unpackHint: Each unit becomes {{grams}} g of loose weight.
stock.invalidThreshold: Enter a valid low stock threshold

shipment.title: Shipment
shipment.markReceived: Mark this order as received? This will update stock levels.

stockReport.title: Stock Report
stockReport.subtitle: Day start and day end quantities per product from stocktake audit (select date and optional store).
stockReport.noData: No stocktake data for this date. Day start / day end come from completed stocktakes.

productBarcodeReference.title: Product barcode sheet
productBarcodeReference.subtitle: English and Chinese product names with scannable barcode images, grouped by category. Filter, then print for the POS desk.
productBarcodeReference.popupBlocked: Pop-up was blocked. Please allow pop-ups and try again.

stocktake.title: Stocktake
stocktake.subtitle: Day-start stocktake records (first login and result per user per store).
stocktake.printReport: Print date start / date end stock record

storeDetail.productsHint: Add products and set inventory quantities. Mark wholesale ship-from for products that always ship from this store.
storeDetail.noProducts: No products assigned to this store

companySettings.title: Company Settings
companySettings.subtitle: Company details appear on order confirmation PDFs (header). Payment details appear at the end of the invoice.
companySettings.paymentSubtitle: Free-form payment details shown at the end of the invoice PDF (max 5 lines).
companySettings.paymentPlaceholder: e.g. Account: Heartwood Trading Ltd, Sort code: 23-08-01, Account number: 25307108
companySettings.saveSuccess: Company settings saved. They will appear on order confirmation PDFs.
companySettings.paymentMaxLinesError: Payment details must not exceed 5 lines.
companySettings.paymentTransferToSection: Transferred to account options (first line skipped)
companySettings.paymentTransferToSubtitle: Used for recording “轉入帳戶” when uploading payment proofs. First line is intentionally skipped.
companySettings.paymentTransferToPlaceholder: First line is skipped (placeholder). Then one account per line.
companySettings.emailSectionSubtitle: Default Cc address when sending wholesale order documents from an order detail page.
companySettings.wholesaleOrderEmailDefaultCcHint: One or more addresses, same as the email dialog on a wholesale order. Leave empty for no default Cc.
companySettings.shipmentCouriersSubtitle: One courier per line. Used in the start-shipment dialog autocomplete (management). If empty, defaults to In-house, DPD, and Royal Mail.
companySettings.shipmentCouriersHelperMax: Maximum {{max}} lines. Leave blank to use built-in defaults.

wholesaleShipments.title: Wholesale shipments
wholesaleShipments.packingHint: Follow the steps: scan all items, confirm box counts, then confirm courier details.
wholesaleShipments.postPackingHint: Upload signed delivery proof or update courier and tracking.
wholesaleShipments.noActionsHint: No further actions for this shipment.
wholesaleShipments.shipmentPacked: Shipment packed. Upload delivery proof to complete.
wholesaleShipments.scanPackingHint: Scan each item barcode. Weight products will prompt for grams after scan.
wholesaleShipments.productNotInShipment: Product is not in this shipment
wholesaleShipments.scanCappedToRemaining: Only the remaining quantity was counted ({{qty}}).
wholesaleShipments.scanExceedsOrderFullMessage: {{name}} is already fully packed. Ordered: {{expected}}, scanned: {{scanned}}.
wholesaleShipments.scanExceedsOrderCappedMessage: {{name}}: ordered {{expected}}, already scanned {{scanned}}. This scan adds {{attempted}} but only {{applied}} can be counted.
wholesaleShipments.noStockBanner: {{count}} line(s) have no stock at this store. You can continue packing after confirming.
wholesaleShipments.noPackingLines: This shipment has no products to pack. Assign items to the shipment on the wholesale order first.
wholesaleShipments.noStockScanConfirmMessage: {{name}} has no stock at this store. Continue packing anyway?
wholesaleShipments.noStockCompleteConfirmMessage: Some items have no stock at this store. You can still complete packing if you confirm.
wholesaleShipments.scanAllItemsFirst: Scan all items before completing packing.
wholesaleShipments.packingDataLoadFailed: Failed to load products and stock for packing
wholesaleShipments.confirmBoxesHint: Review or adjust the box count for each line item.
wholesaleShipments.monitorViewHint: Completed shows the last 3 days in monitor view (10 days in list view). Auto-refreshes every 30s.
wholesaleShipments.monitorColumnPackingHint: Scan items and confirm box counts. Tap ▶ to pack orders in queue.
wholesaleShipments.monitorColumnPackedHint: Ready for courier pickup. Tap ▶ to select courier and confirm handover.
wholesaleShipments.monitorColumnShippedHint: Courier has collected. Open order to upload signed delivery note.
wholesaleShipments.monitorColumnCompletedHint: Delivery confirmed. Tap an order to view details.
wholesaleShipments.packingQueueDone: All orders in the queue are packed
wholesaleShipments.courierPickupCourierHint: Tap the courier(s) collecting orders, then scan each delivery note to confirm pickup.
wholesaleShipments.courierPickupNoCouriersConfigured: No couriers configured. Add couriers in Company Settings first.
wholesaleShipments.courierPickupScanHint: Scan or type the delivery note / order number. {{remaining}} remaining for selected couriers.
wholesaleShipments.courierPickupScanPlaceholder: Scan barcode or enter order number
wholesaleShipments.courierPickupNotFound: No packed order matched "{{code}}" for the selected couriers
wholesaleShipments.courierPickupAllDone: No more packed orders for these couriers
wholesaleShipments.courierPickupClickToConfirm: Scan a delivery note, or tap an order in the list below to confirm pickup.
wholesaleShipments.courierPickupConfirmOrderMessage: Mark {{order}} as picked up by the courier?
wholesaleShipments.courierPickupSelectOneCourier: Choose one courier who is collecting orders today.
wholesaleShipments.courierPickupScanSelectHint: Scan a delivery note to tick an order in the list.
wholesaleShipments.courierPickupConfirmBatchMessage: Mark {{count}} order(s) as picked up by {{courier}}?

wholesaleOrdersPage.exportConfirmHintSelection: Only the rows you checked will be included.
wholesaleOrdersPage.exportConfirmHintFiltered: No rows are checked. All orders matching your current filters will be included.
wholesaleOrdersPage.exportTablePdf: Download a summary PDF for checked rows, or all orders matching filters if none are checked.
wholesaleOrdersPage.exportTableCsv: Download CSV for checked rows, or all orders matching filters if none are checked.
wholesaleOrdersPage.exportZipNoFiles: No matching attachments for the selected orders
wholesaleOrdersPage.exportZipEmailHint: With {{count}} or more orders, the ZIP is built on the server and a download link is emailed to you (avoids a slow browser download).
wholesaleOrdersPage.exportZipEmailDone: The ZIP was built and an email with the download link was sent. Opening the file in a new tab…
wholesaleOrdersPage.exportZipEmailSmtpFailed: ZIP is ready but email failed. Download here:
wholesaleOrdersPage.exportZipEmailQueued: When the ZIP is ready, you will receive an email with a download link.
wholesaleOrdersPage.exportZipEmailRequired: Enter an email address to receive the ZIP.
wholesaleOrdersPage.exportZipEmailNotConfigured: Email delivery is not configured on the server. Ask an administrator to set SMTP, or export fewer orders for an instant download.

wholesaleOrderDetail.uploadProofWillCompleteOrderHint: Uploading this proof will complete the order automatically.
wholesaleOrderDetail.paymentProofRequired: Please select at least one payment proof file.
wholesaleOrderDetail.confirmRegenAfterEmail: {{document}} was already emailed to the client. Regenerating will replace the file they received. Continue?
wholesaleOrderDetail.documentRegenSkippedAfterEmail: {{document}} was not regenerated because it was already emailed to the client.
wholesaleOrderDetail.confirmUnlockUploadsAfterComplete: This order is completed. Unlocking will allow uploading or removing attachments. Continue?
wholesaleOrderDetail.confirmUnlockOrder: Unlocking will allow regenerating emailed documents and uploading or changing attachments on this order. Continue?
wholesaleOrderDetail.invoiceSentDateHint: Record when the invoice was sent to the client. This does not change the invoice PDF date.
wholesaleOrderDetail.invoiceSentDateSaveError: Failed to save invoice sent date
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailCcHint: Defaults from Company settings → Wholesale order emails (leave empty there for no Cc)
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailAddressListHint: Add recipients as chips: type an email and press Enter.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailSendInvoiceReadyHint: Invoice is ready — send to the client
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailSendInvoiceAwaitingShipments: Complete all shipments before sending the invoice
wholesaleOrderDetail.askSendOrderConfirmEmail: Order endorsed. Send order confirmation email with PO attachment to the client now?
wholesaleOrderDetail.askSendShipmentsDeliveredEmail: All delivery proofs are uploaded. Send shipments delivered email to the client now?
wholesaleOrderDetail.askSendInvoiceEmail: Send invoice email to the client now?
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailSkipDialogHint: Please enter a remark explaining why this email is being skipped.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailSkipRemarkRequired: A remark is required to skip this email.
wholesaleOrderDetail.sectionPendingConfirmAllocation: Confirm store allocation to unlock this step.
wholesaleOrderDetail.sectionPendingOrderConfirmEmail: Send the order confirmation email first to unlock shipments.
wholesaleOrderDetail.sectionPendingCompleteShipments: Complete all shipments first to unlock this step.
wholesaleOrderDetail.sectionPendingDeliveryCompleteEmail: Send the delivery complete email first to unlock this step.
wholesaleOrderDetail.sectionPendingInvoiceEmail: Complete the invoice email step first to unlock payment proof upload.
wholesaleOrderDetail.sectionPendingInvoiceNotReady: Invoice PDF will be available after earlier steps are completed.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailStructuredSubjectHelper: Pre-filled English template. Edit before sending if needed.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailResendAfterSkipHint: Previously skipped — no email was sent. Fill in the form below and click Send if you want to send it now.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailContentLanguagesHint: Select one or more. Subject and message are generated in each selected language.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailSubjectHelper: Pre-filled from template; multiple languages are joined with " / ". Edit before sending if needed.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailMessagePlaceholder: Optional message to include in the email body
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailMessageHelper: Pre-filled with order details; multiple languages are separated by a divider. Edit before sending if needed.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailInvoiceIncludeDeliveryProofsHint: Optionally include signed delivery proof(s) from all shipments with the invoice.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailInvoiceOptionalAttachmentsHint: Optionally include delivery note(s) and/or signed delivery proof(s) from all shipments with the invoice.
wholesaleOrderDetail.askSendShipmentDocumentsEmail: Send delivery note and/or delivery proof for {{count}} selected shipment(s)?
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailShipmentDocumentsHint: Only documents available for the selected shipment(s) can be attached.
wholesaleOrderDetail.noDeliveryNoteForSelectedShipments: No delivery note available for the selected shipment(s)
wholesaleOrderDetail.noDeliveryProofForSelectedShipments: No delivery proof available for the selected shipment(s)
wholesaleOrderDetail.noShipmentDocumentsForSelected: No delivery note or delivery proof available for the selected shipment(s)
wholesaleOrderDetail.poAttachmentsHint: Download, add or remove purchase order files (PDF or images). Drag and drop anywhere here to add.
wholesaleOrderDetail.poAttachmentsLockedHint: Download PO files. Press Edit to add or remove attachments.
wholesaleOrderDetail.dragDropOrChoose: Drag and drop PDF or images here, or
wholesaleOrderDetail.endorsePreviewFailed: Could not check stock for this order
wholesaleOrderDetail.endorseSingleStoreConfirm: All items can be fulfilled from {{store}}. Assign this order to {{store}} and endorse?
wholesaleOrderDetail.endorseSplitRequiredWarning: Split shipment is required. The suggested allocation uses {{count}} stores.
wholesaleOrderDetail.endorseInsufficientStockWarning: Stock is not enough to fully fulfill this order. You can still endorse and assign manually.
wholesaleOrderDetail.endorseSuccessManualAssign: Order endorsed. Assign lines to stores below.
wholesaleOrderDetail.manualEndorseAssignHint: Assign all lines to stores (you can split a line across two stores). Click Confirm allocation when finished to approve the order.
wholesaleOrderDetail.manualEndorseInProgress: Complete store assignment below. The order is approved when all lines are assigned.
wholesaleOrderDetail.manualEndorseDefaultsStaged: Default allocation staged. Review and click Endorse order when ready.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignAllBeforeConfirm: Assign all order lines before confirming.
wholesaleOrderDetail.resubmitHint: Update the order as needed, then resubmit for approval.
wholesaleOrderDetail.confirmUpdateOrderDateRegenAllDocs: Updating the Order date will re-generate all existing documents. Continue?
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignByDefaultsDone: Assigned pending lines to default ship stores
wholesaleOrderDetail.selectLinesToAssign: Select at least one line to assign.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignmentRemoved: Assignment removed. You can assign to another store.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignReassignHint: To change store assignment, use Change assignment in the Shipments section below.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailSendOrderConfirmHint: Send the order confirmation email with the order confirmation PDF to the client. PO attachments are optional.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailSendOrderConfirmAwaitingConfirmatio: Complete order confirmation (assign all lines) before sending.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailSendOrderConfirmNeedsOc: Generate the order confirmation document before sending.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignDragHint: Drag quantities from Pending assignment to a store chip above; click Confirm allocation when done.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignHowToStep1Body: Drag a quantity from the Pending assignment table onto a store chip above.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignHowToStep2Body: In the dialog, change the quantity to assign only part of a line. The rest stays pending; assigned qty appears in that store’s table.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignHowToStep3Body: When every line is fully assigned, click Confirm allocation.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignHowToStoreGreen: Green: enough stock at that store for all pending items.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignHowToStoreOrange: Orange: enough stock for only some pending items (insufficient for the rest).
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignSplitQtyHint: Enter quantity to assign (max {{max}}). Leave part unassigned to split across two stores.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignMobileHint: Drag and drop is not available on mobile. Use Assign on pending lines, or tap a quantity chip on assigned lines to move or unassign.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignMobileStoreStockSortHint: Stores with enough stock are listed first.
wholesaleOrderDetail.allocationConfirmedSuccess: Allocation confirmed. Send the order confirmation email or skip to continue.
wholesaleOrderDetail.orderConfirmEmailSkipped: Order confirmation email skipped. You can proceed to shipments.
wholesaleOrderDetail.shipmentsDeliveredEmailSkipped: Delivery complete email skipped. You can proceed to the invoice email.
wholesaleOrderDetail.skipShipmentsDeliveredEmailFailed: Failed to skip delivery complete email.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailSendDeliveryCompleteHint: Send the delivery complete email with signed delivery proofs for all shipments.
wholesaleOrderDetail.emailSendDeliveryCompleteAwaitingProof: Upload signed delivery proofs for all shipments before sending.
wholesaleOrderDetail.skipOrderConfirmEmailFailed: Failed to skip order confirmation email.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignBlockedCompletedShipment: Cannot change assignment after the shipment is completed.
wholesaleOrderDetail.startShipmentHint: Enter actual boxes, courier, and tracking. Generates the delivery note and moves the shipment to Packed. Use courier pickup to mark Shipped, then upload delivery proof to complete.
wholesaleOrderDetail.uploadSignedDeliveryNoteHint: Upload a photo or PDF of the customer-signed delivery note.
wholesaleOrderDetail.uploadSignedDeliveryNoteNoDnHint: Use Start shipment (Actions) to generate the delivery note first.
wholesaleOrderDetail.uploadSignedDeliveryNoteAwaitingCourierC: This shipment has not been picked up by the courier yet. Please confirm courier pickup on the shipments dashboard before uploading delivery proof.
wholesaleOrderDetail.uploadSignedDeliveryNoteFailed: Failed to upload signed delivery note
wholesaleOrderDetail.askSendSignedDeliveryNoteEmail: Delivery proof uploaded. Send confirmation email to the client now?
wholesaleOrderDetail.trackingNumberHint: Optional. Saved on the delivery note. Mark shipped via courier pickup.
wholesaleOrderDetail.confirmPaymentReceivedHint: Upload payment proof (bank transfer screenshot, etc.) to confirm receipt.
wholesaleOrderDetail.paymentProofAfterInvoiceHint: Invoice email is done — upload payment proof to complete this order.
wholesaleOrderDetail.noProofWarningMessage: No payment proof has been uploaded. Are you sure you want to confirm without proof?
wholesaleOrderDetail.forceConfirmPaymentWarningMessage: This will mark payment as received without matching the uploaded proof total. Only use this if you are certain payment is complete.
wholesaleOrderDetail.addMoreProofHint: Add more payment proofs (PDF or image). Drag and drop or choose files.
wholesaleOrderDetail.shippingFeeHint: Enter the order shipping fee (shown on invoice).
wholesaleOrderDetail.shippingFeeAllComplete: All shipments for this order are completed. The invoice will be re-generated with the new total.
wholesaleOrderDetail.discountHint: Enter the order-level discount in £ (max subtotal £{{max}}).
wholesaleOrderDetail.discountAllComplete: All shipments are completed. The invoice will be re-generated with the new total.
wholesaleOrderDetail.completeShipmentHint: This will generate a delivery note and mark the shipment as completed. Shipping fee is set at order level (edit on the order summary).
wholesaleOrderDetail.forceMoveToPendingPaymentConfirm: Force move this order to pending payment?
wholesaleOrderDetail.editBoxesHint: Update case/box count per product. The delivery note PDF will be regenerated with the new values.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignmentWarningHint: Please double confirm the following assignment.
wholesaleOrderDetail.assignmentWarningHint2: Do you want to assign anyway?

wholesaleOrderAudit.title: Audit log — Order #{{id}}
wholesaleOrderAudit.confirmUpdateShipmentCompleteDateRegenIn: Updating shipment complete date will re-generate invoice and delivery notes. Continue?
wholesaleOrderAudit.confirmRestoreDocument: Set this document version as the active one? The current active file will be replaced.

assignProductToStore.title: Assign product to store
assignProductToStore.subtitle: Click a product image to enlarge. Check or uncheck stores to assign each variant, then click Submit to save. Changed cells are highlighted in yellow. Use the Ship column to mark which store always ships wholesale orders for that variant (one store per product).
assignProductToStore.shipFromRequiresAssignment: Assign the product to this store first

currencyRates.title: Currency Rates
currencyRates.pinCurrency: Pin this currency (show at top of lists)
currencyRates.info: Currency rates are relative to GBP (base currency). Use the "Sync from API" button to automatically fetch the latest rates from a free exchange rate API, or manually add/edit rates as needed. Pinned currencies (📌) will always appear at the top.

orders.title: Orders
orders.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?

profile.title: My Profile
profile.pinInfo: Enter your current PIN and a new PIN to change it.
profile.pinMinLength: PIN must be at least 4 characters
profile.pinMismatch: New PIN and confirmation do not match
